mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_instance ( tenant_id, job_definition_id, trigger_request_id, job_code, instance_no, biz_date, trigger_type, instance_status, batch_no, operator_id, rerun_flag, retry_flag, rerun_reason, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, queue_code, worker_group, priority, dedup_key, run_attempt, version, expected_partition_count, success_partition_count, failed_partition_count, trace_id, params_snapshot, result_summary, deadline_at, expected_duration_seconds, sla_alerted_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobDefinitionId}, #{triggerRequestId}, #{jobCode}, #{instanceNo}, #{bizDate}, #{triggerType}, #{instanceStatus}, #{batchNo}, #{operatorId}, #{rerunFlag}, #{retryFlag}, #{rerunReason}, #{relatedFileId}, #{parentInstanceId}, #{queueCode}, #{workerGroup}, #{priority}, #{dedupKey}, #{runAttempt}, #{version}, #{expectedPartitionCount}, #{successPartitionCount}, #{failedPartitionCount}, #{traceId}, #{paramsSnapshot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{deadlineAt}, #{expectedDurationSeconds}, #{slaAlertedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_instance set instance_status = #{instanceStatus}, success_partition_count = #{successPartitionCount}, failed_partition_count = #{failedPartitionCount}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: select * from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is null and ( (deadline_at is not null and deadline_at < current_timestamp) or ( expected_duration_seconds > 0 and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second') ) ) order by coalesce( deadline_at, started_at + (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second'), created_at ) asc, id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('WAITING', 'READY', 'RUNNING') and sla_alerted_at is null and ( (deadline_at is not null and deadline_at < current_timestamp) or ( expected_duration_seconds > 0 and started_at is not null and started_at < current_timestamp - (expected_duration_seconds * interval '1 second') ) )
select count(1) from batch.job_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING')

select count(1) from batch.job_instance ji where ji.instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING') and ji.tenant_id in ( select tenant_id from batch.tenant_quota_policy where enabled = true and fair_share_group = #{fairShareGroup} )
select count(1) from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('READY', 'RUNNING')
